title: Opening projects from the portfolio board
excerpt: Hello, I’m having an issue with my Monday.com Portfolio Board. When I try to open up the projects page for a specific line item, it opens a different project board with a different name. Usually the line item above it. I…

posts.author: NCLL (Nickie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’m having an issue with my Monday.com Portfolio Board. When I try to open up the projects page for a specific line item, it opens a different project board with a different name. Usually the line item above it. If I rename it in the project board, it then renames the wrong line item in the portfolio board.
Has anyone experienced this and know how to fix?
Thanks, Nickie

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nickie,

Sorry to hear this and thank you for your patience in my reply!

Can I ask if you’re still encountering this behaviour? If so, to rule out any caching issues, can you please test this behaviour in an incognito window?

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: For my portfolio, whenever I click on any line item, a project overview is displayed. How is it that you are able to go directly to a project page in general? The only way I’ve found is using a hyperlink in a text column.
